overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a first-person exploration of 'The Cyclops Dock,' an ancient Greek waterfront construction site. The player walks through a lumber yard, past stone warehouses with scaffolding, around a circular beacon structure, and along a wooden pier extending into a bright blue Mediterranean harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: lumber storage yard at ancient Greek dock

events.description: moving from lumber stacks toward open waterfront area
approaching the wooden cart and open dock area near water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the lumber yard toward the waterfront

entered.detail: tall stacks of wooden planks and beams arranged in the yard
old wooden wagon with cargo parked on the dirt ground
loose wooden boards scattered across the dirt surface
green leafy trees surrounding the lumber yard perimeter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit lumber yard with stacks of wooden planks and a parked cart. The camera walks forward on dirt ground scattered with loose boards, moving toward an open area with a glimpse of the waterfront in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone warehouse exterior with construction scaffolding

events.description: turning left to follow along the stone building wall
approaching large red clay pottery jars near the building

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone warehouse wall with wooden scaffolding

entered.detail: ancient stone block wall of a large warehouse building
temporary wooden construction scaffolding attached to the building
large amphora-style pottery vessels sitting on the ground
wooden tripod frame structure near the building corner

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to follow a large stone warehouse wall with wooden scaffolding. Large red clay jars appear on the right as the path continues along the building exterior, leaving the lumber yard behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular stone beacon structure at waterfront edge

events.description: circling around the circular stone beacon structure
emerging from behind beacon to full waterfront and harbor view

agents.ego_description: circling the stone beacon structure and approaching the water's edge

notable_agents.action: walking along the waterfront path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: round stone tower with burning pyre of logs on top
wooden lattice fence structure near the beacon
open view of the blue sea and distant coastline
ancient Greek buildings and temples across the bay

segments.scene_description: The camera circles a prominent circular stone beacon with a burning pyre on top, revealing a panoramic waterfront view. An NPC walks along the path as the scene opens up to show the harbor and distant coastal town across the blue water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier extending over the harbor water

events.description: stepping from dirt ground onto wooden dock planks
passing a lit brazier fire on the dock side

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier extending over the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock walkway extending over the water
small stone building with red roof at the dock entrance
metal fire bowl with active flames on the dock edge
vertical wooden pilings in the water alongside the pier

segments.scene_description: The camera steps onto a wooden pier extending over the clear blue water, passing a lit brazier. The stone dock building remains visible on the left while wooden posts line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of wooden pier overlooking open sea

events.description: slowing and stopping at the end of the pier
looking down at the clear water and sandy bottom below the pier edge

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the pier and looking down at the water below

entered.detail: expansive view of the blue Mediterranean sea with distant islands
sandy beach visible beneath the clear shallow water

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the end of the wooden pier, backlit by the bright sun over the open sea. Looking down, the clear turquoise water reveals the sandy bottom below, with distant islands visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dusty inland lumber yard toward the open expanse of a bright Mediterranean harbor. It begins by walking through stacks of wooden planks and carts on a dirt path, moving forward until the camera turns left to follow the scaffolding of a large stone warehouse and a row of red clay jars. As the path clears, the camera circles a circular stone beacon topped with a burning pyre, opening the view to a panoramic vista of the harbor and a distant coastal town. The scene then shifts onto a wooden pier, passing a lit brazier while the stone dock buildings recede to the left. Finally, the camera reaches the end of the pier, looking down into clear turquoise water that reveals the sandy bottom below before facing the bright sun and distant islands on the horizon.
